form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr1) over 2180m at Kilmore was 2nd-4.41 at the bell, beaten 16 m by Kiss At Midnight (2:48.10) in 0-3 WINs on March 26 at $10. Before that, 7th (Sr2) over 1690m at Kilmore beaten 24 m by Straight To Thetop (2:07.20) in NR up to 50 on March 12 at $10. Should get every chance from this draw.

form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 7th (20m Fr3) over 2180m after racing wide at Stawell beaten 45 m by Kamaran (2:51.00) in No NR on April 3 at $16. At her previous start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr7) over 1690m at this track, at the bell was 5th-9.2 beaten 9 m by Ai Sedhai (2:05.50) in NR 42 to 47 on March 30 at $12. Fitter so is capable of a better showing.

form.formComment: 11-year-old mare showed improvement last start. 3rd (Fr2) over 1690m at this track, at the bell was 3rd-4 beaten 6 m by Ai Sedhai (2:05.50) in NR 42 to 47 on March 30 at $26. The race before was not as impressive when well beaten into sixth behind Blackrange Glory at this track over 1690m in a NR 45 to 50 on March 16 at $26. Place best.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to her best. Last start broke in score up and was out of position at the start 5th (Fr5) over 2240m at Melton beaten 25 m by Bar Tab (2:48.70) in 0-1 WIN on March 20 at $5.50. Building in fitness.
